title: ctenitis hendersonii
intro: Ctenitis hendersonii, also known as Henderson's ctenitis, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to New Zealand and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Ctenitis hendersonii is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
